measurability.reason: No commitments were found for Methane Reduction Targets.

gap_findings.description: Australia makes no commitment on methane reduction targets.
gap_findings.ipcc_evidence: IPCC AR6 WG3 SPM: reducing methane ~34% by 2030 vs 2020 buys near-term warming relief and is cost-effective.

gap_findings.description: Australia's commitment is conditional on receiving international finance.
gap_findings.ipcc_evidence: IPCC AR6 WG3 SPM: reducing methane ~34% by 2030 vs 2020 buys near-term warming relief and is cost-effective.

details.summary: Australia lacks a commitment on methane reduction targets, and its potential commitment is conditional on international finance.
